title: Save & Load Game

actors.name: Player
actors.description: Human user interacting with save/load dialogs

actors.name: System (Autosave)
actors.description: Automated save triggered by game loop or sector events

use_cases.name: Overwrite Existing Save
use_cases.trigger: Player clicks an existing save slot in SaveDialog

use_cases.name: Load Game from Slot
use_cases.trigger: Player clicks a save slot in LoadDialog
flow: SaveSlot.cautiousLoad(): checks missing mods → warns or proceeds

use_cases.name: Import Save File
flow: Check meta.rules.sector != null → reject campaign saves with '@save.nocampaign'
control.saves.importSave(file): new SaveSlot → slot.importFile(file) [copies file] → SaveIO.getMeta(slot.file)

use_cases.name: Export Save File
use_cases.trigger: Player clicks export icon (Icon.export) on a save slot row
flow: LoadDialog.rebuild(): t.button(Icon.export) → platform.export('save-' + slot.getName(), saveExtension, slot::exportFile)

use_cases.name: Delete Save Slot
use_cases.trigger: Player clicks trash icon on a save slot row
flow: SaveSlot.delete(): delete backup file → delete main file → saves.remove(this) → unload preview asset

use_cases.name: Rename Save Slot
use_cases.trigger: Player clicks pencil icon on a save slot row

use_cases.name: Toggle Autosave
use_cases.trigger: Player clicks autosave toggle (Icon.save) on a save slot row

use_cases.name: Preview Save Thumbnail
use_cases.trigger: LoadDialog renders a save slot button
flow: On save: savePreview() writes PNG via renderer.minimap.getPixmap()

use_cases.name: Search / Filter Save Slots
use_cases.trigger: Player types in search field or toggles game mode filter
flow: LoadDialog.setup(): searchField onChange → searchString = text → rebuild()
Mode filter buttons: hidden.addUnique(mode) or hidden.remove(mode) → rebuild()
rebuild(): filters slots by slot.isHidden(), name contains searchString, slot.mode() not in hidden

use_cases.name: Browse Filesystem for Save File
use_cases.trigger: FileChooser dialog opened (via import or export)
flow: setupWidgets(): navigation bar (home/back/forward/up) + file list + filename field + ok/cancel
updateFiles(): list directory, filter non-matching files, handle navigation history (FileHistory.push/back/forward)

key_classes.name: SaveDialog
key_classes.notes: Overrides LoadDialog: adds 'New Slot' button; button click prompts overwrite confirm before saving

key_classes.name: LoadDialog
key_classes.notes: Main UI container; addSetup() adds Import button; rebuild() renders all slot rows with preview thumbnails

key_classes.name: SaveSlot
key_classes.notes: Core domain object. save() calls SaveIO.save()+savePreview(); load() calls SaveIO.load()+savePreview(); preview stored as .png, loaded as .spreview via SavePreviewLoader

key_classes.name: Saves
key_classes.notes: Manages list of SaveSlot instances; importSave copies file and calls getMeta

key_classes.name: SaveIO
key_classes.notes: Low-level persistence. Validates save files and reads/writes compressed binary format

key_classes.name: SavePreviewLoader
key_classes.notes: Async GPU texture loader for save thumbnails. Loads the .png sibling of the .spreview asset descriptor

key_classes.name: MapIO
key_classes.notes: Reads/writes .msav map files via SaveIO. generatePreview renders minimap Pixmap from tile data. Not directly used in SaveDialog/LoadDialog but provides map preview capability

key_classes.name: FileChooser
key_classes.notes: Desktop file browser dialog. Supports open/save modes; remembers last directory in Core.settings

key_relationships: SaveDialog extends LoadDialog (inherits all load/import/manage functionality)
LoadDialog depends_on SaveSlot (displays, operates on slots)
LoadDialog depends_on Saves (calls control.saves.getSaveSlots(), addSave(), importSave())
LoadDialog uses FileChooser (via platform.showFileChooser for import/export)
SaveSlot depends_on SaveIO (save(), load(), getMeta(), isSaveValid())
SaveSlot uses SavePreviewLoader (via Core.assets.load for async thumbnail)
Saves contains SaveSlot (inner class, manages Seq<SaveSlot>)
MapIO uses SaveIO (createMap, loadMap delegate to SaveIO.readHeader/load/write)
important_notes: SaveDialog reuses all LoadDialog slot management (delete/rename/autosave/export/import) — it only changes the button click behavior (save vs load). Preview thumbnails use a two-file scheme: .png written by minimap renderer, .spreview asset descriptor that SavePreviewLoader resolves back to the .png. FileChooser is desktop-only; mobile uses platform.showFileChooser native picker. Campaign sector saves are hidden from the UI (isHidden() returns true for sector saves).
